creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
It does the same thing according to CMake's manual?

"
-v, --verbose

    Enable verbose output - if supported - including the build commands to be executed.

    This option can be omitted if VERBOSE environment variable or CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE cached variable is set."

https://cmake.org/cmake/help/latest/manual/cmake.1.html#build-tool-mode
